title: Latvian government says it is doing well in lengthy progress report on itself
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) perhaps unsurprisingly said her government was doing well on March 2nd, as she outlined its achievements over the last year.
summary_public: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) perhaps unsurprisingly said her government was doing well on March 2nd, as she outlined its achievements over the last year.

LV.evidence: Latvian government says it is doing well
